subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 746882332/240901471 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (Florida tech) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 746882332/240901471 at 11:18:47.69 UT
on 01 September 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely accidental."
